action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 22 history shows previous train attempt had RuntimeError in _prepare_attention_masks_4d due to Long tensor vs boolean. Analysis: We need to cast attention_mask to bool in collate and predict. Also need to fix delta-to-absolute conversion in predict.py and ensure checkpoint saving. Decision: Write train_v5.py with bool fix, train for 2 epochs on 200 episodes, copy stats to checkpoint, then submit eval with updated predict.py. This will give a non-zero baseline and measure improvement.
action.command: python train_v5.py --test && python train_v5.py --train --epochs 2 --max_episodes 200 && cp stats_pad.json checkpoints/pi0_lora_v5/
